name: Renewable Electricity Production Credit (PTC)

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must produce electricity from qualified resources at a qualified facility and sell it to an unrelated person. Credit is increased 5x if prevailing wage and apprenticeship requirements are met.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a per-kilowatt-hour tax credit for electricity produced from qualified energy resources (wind, biomass, geothermal, solar, etc.) and sold to unrelated persons.
